pageContext.name: Agrias Oaks
pageContext.description: From FINAL FANTASY TACTICS, which gained popularity as the first Tactical RPG in the FINAL FANTASY series: Agrias Oaks, a knight serving in the Lionsguard, joins the BRING ARTS line!  Staying true to the game's clean and distinctive character design, this figure embodies her brimming sense of justice and chivalry through sculpted details from her braided hair, commanding expression, shoulder, and chest armor.   The armored shoulders and waist articulate smoothly, allowing for lively and dynamic poses.   Extra sets of hands and a sword are included, allowing you to recreate some of the atmosphere and feelings you had playing the original game.  Figure includes display stand.
